organization.name: E-Cell IIST Indore
organization.description: E-Cell IIST Indore is the entrepreneurship cell of IIST Indore, focused on innovation, startup culture, events, and student-led entrepreneurial growth.
organization.brand_message: Building founders, startups, and innovation culture on campus.

events.title: Startup Showdown
events.details: Startup-themed flagship activity listed in the event showcase.

events.title: EAP — Entrepreneurship Awareness Program
events.details: Entrepreneurship awareness event listed in the event showcase.

events.title: E-Cell × GDG Indore — AI & Entrepreneurship
events.details: Joint session with Google Developer Group Indore on the intersection of AI and entrepreneurship, including idea validation, workflow automation, and building with modern AI tools.

events.title: NEC Finals — AIR 46 out of 7,000+ Teams
events.details: Team E-Cell IIST competed in the National Entrepreneurship Challenge by IIT Bombay and secured All India Rank 46 among 7,000+ teams.

events.title: YEF Summit Bharat 2025
events.details: Representation at a national-level youth entrepreneurship summit; networking with founders, investors, and student innovators.

events.title: Pitch Perfect — Eureka Zonal Rounds
events.details: Pitch-focused event participation listed in the event showcase.

events.title: Startup Deep Dive Challenge
events.details: Deep-dive startup challenge listed in the event showcase.

events.title: Team Meet — Tools for Productivity & Club Operations
events.details: Internal capability-building session focused on productivity tools and smoother club operations.

events.title: Ground Discussion — Entrepreneurship Problems on Campus
events.details: Discussion-led event focused on identifying entrepreneurship-related campus challenges.

contact.address: Indore Institute of Science & Technology, Indore, Madhya Pradesh — 453331

institutional_context.accreditation: NAAC A+ Accredited · Affiliated to RGPV Bhopal · Approved by AICTE

chatbase_ready_qna.a: E-Cell IIST Indore is the Entrepreneurship Cell of IIST Indore. It focuses on innovation, startup culture, events, and student-led entrepreneurial growth on campus.

chatbase_ready_qna.q: What are the key achievements of E-Cell IIST Indore?
chatbase_ready_qna.a: The cell has reached 500+ students, conducted 10+ events, participated in 3 national competitions, and built 2 industry collaborations. In NEC by IIT Bombay, the team secured AIR 46 among 7,000+ teams.

chatbase_ready_qna.q: How can I contact E-Cell IIST Indore?
chatbase_ready_qna.a: You can contact via email at thecharcoalteam@gmail.com, Instagram at @ecell_iist_indore, and LinkedIn at E-CELL IIST.

chatbase_ready_qna.q: Where is E-Cell IIST Indore based?
chatbase_ready_qna.a: At Indore Institute of Science & Technology, Indore, Madhya Pradesh — 453331.

chatbase_ready_qna.q: Who are the key office bearers?
chatbase_ready_qna.a: President: Vedansh Patidar. Vice Presidents: Ashwani Tiwari and Gouri Tiwari.

chatbase_ready_qna.q: What flagship events has E-Cell IIST conducted?
chatbase_ready_qna.a: Startup Showdown, EAP, E-Cell × GDG Indore (AI & Entrepreneurship), NEC Finals participation, YEF Summit Bharat 2025, Pitch Perfect (Eureka Zonal Rounds), Startup Deep Dive Challenge, Team Meet, and Ground Discussion.
